name: io.github.carsonroell-debug/selfheal-mcp
title: SelfHeal MCP
description: Self-healing proxy for MCP servers — retry with backoff, circuit breaker, fallback chains, and call observability

environmentVariables.name: SELFHEAL_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to selfheal.config.json (optional, defaults to cwd)

tools.name: wrap_call
tools.description: Execute an HTTP call with retry, circuit breaker, and metrics

tools.name: circuit_status
tools.description: Check circuit breaker health for any target

tools.name: circuit_reset
tools.description: Reset a circuit breaker to healthy state

tools.name: metrics
tools.description: Get call observability — success rates, latency, top errors

tools.name: recent_errors
tools.description: Get recent failed calls with full error details
